name: Hospital Muslin Swaddle Baby Blanket and Headband Gift Set - Floral Blooms - 2pk - Cloud Island™
description:
This Hospital Muslin Swaddle Baby Blanket and Headband Gift Set from cloud island™ is a lovely present for parents-to-be. This two-piece set includes a 47-inch square muslin swaddle blanket and a knitted headband with a bow. Decorated with floral blooms in red, pink, blue and green on a white background for a vibrant look, both items in the set are made of 100% cotton and are machine washable for comfortable use and convenient cleaning.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
